title: Merlin Labs - R3KT
relevance_summary: Deposit followed by manual transfer to trigger reward minting on a testing vault

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deposits funds and then manually transfers a large amount to the same contract within a short timeframe

red_flags: Manual transfer of large amounts shortly after deposit
vulnerable_contracts: Merlin Finance Alpaca single asset vaults
summary: A hacker exploited Merlin Finance by depositing BNB and then manually transferring a large amount to trigger reward minting on a testing vault. A guard could have blocked such transactions to prevent the exploit.
